intro_text:
Maybe you've noticed you're drinking more than you used to. Or working longer hours to avoid feeling what's underneath. Or your relationship is struggling because old patterns keep showing up in new ways.

You know something has to change. You're here because you're finally ready to figure out what that something is.

I'm Kaylie, and I specialize in helping adults and couples in Leesburg, Virginia unpack the trauma that's been running the show. Together, we'll work through the anxiety, depression, and attachment wounds that keep you stuck in cycles you desperately want to break.
intro_title: You're exhausted from managing everyone else's expectations while your own needs sit on the back burner.
feature_title: When Old Wounds Keep Showing Up in Your Present
hero_title: You've Been Holding It Together for Everyone Else. What About *You?*
feature_text:
Developmental trauma doesn't always look like what you see in movies. Sometimes it looks like:

- Never feeling quite good enough, no matter what you accomplish
- Struggling to trust your own judgment or know what you actually want
- Feeling anxious in your relationships but not sure why
- Using work, alcohol, or avoidance to cope with feelings you can't name
- Repeating the same relationship patterns and wondering why nothing changes

These aren't character flaws. They're adaptations you developed to survive situations that were too much to handle at the time.

The problem? What helped you survive back then is now keeping you from truly living.

As a trauma therapist in Leesburg, I work with adults who are ready to understand *why* they do what they do and finally create lasting change.
hero_subtitle: EMDR and Trauma-Informed Therapy in Leesburg, VA for adults and couples ready to stop surviving and start living.
